ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_validation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the data validation rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the data validation rule */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of data validation rule (e.g., required digit, required alpha, optional alphanumeric) */,
  "rule_expression" TEXT /* Regular expression or pattern that defines the rule */,
  "rule_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the rule (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  "rule_enabled" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the rule is enabled or disabled */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the data template */,
  "template_description" TEXT /* Description of the data template */,
  "template_pattern" TEXT /* Pattern of the data template (e.g., 99999, AAA) */,
  "template_expression" TEXT /* Regular expression or pattern that defines the template */,
  "template_enabled" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the template is enabled or disabled */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the template was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the template was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data field */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the data field */,
  "field_description" TEXT /* Description of the data field */,
  "field_type" TEXT /* Type of data field (e.g., required, optional, suppress) */,
  "field_expression" TEXT /* Regular expression or pattern that defines the field */,
  "field_enabled" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the field is enabled or disabled */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the field was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the field was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_field_rules" (
  "field_rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data field rule */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data field */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data validation rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_field_rules_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES data_fields ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_field_rules_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES data_validation_rules ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_field_templates" (
  "field_template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data field template */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data field */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_field_templates_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES data_fields ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_field_templates_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES data_templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incoming_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incoming data */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the incoming data */,
  "data_field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data field */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source from which the data is ingested */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was ingested */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the data validation (e.g., pending, validated, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incoming_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incoming_data_data_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_field_id") REFERENCES data_fields ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outgoing_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outgoing data */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the outgoing data */,
  "data_field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data field */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data destination where the data is sent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was processed and sent */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the data validation (e.g., pending, validated, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outgoing_data_data_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_field_id") REFERENCES data_fields ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outgoing_data_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES data_destination ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation result */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incoming data */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data validation rule */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "validation_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the validation was performed */,
  "validation_context" TEXT /* Additional context information about the validation (e.g., environment, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_results_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES data_validation_rules ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_results_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES incoming_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_messages" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error message */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validation result */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message */,
  "error_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the error (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  "error_context" TEXT /* Additional context information about the error (e.g., environment, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_messages_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES validation_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client that performed the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., API, database, file) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the data source */,
  "source_credentials" TEXT /* Encrypted credentials for accessing the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_destination" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data destination */,
  "destination_name" TEXT /* Name of the data destination */,
  "destination_description" TEXT /* Description of the data destination */,
  "destination_type" TEXT /* Type of the data destination (e.g., API, database, file) */,
  "destination_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the data destination */,
  "destination_credentials" TEXT /* Encrypted credentials for accessing the data destination */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data destination was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data destination was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_processing_jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data processing job */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data destination */,
  "job_status" TEXT /* Status of the data processing job (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of the data processing job (e.g., batch, real-time) */,
  "job_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the job started */,
  "job_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the job ended */,
  "job_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the job in seconds */,
  "job_error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the job failed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the job was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the job was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_processing_jobs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_processing_jobs_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES data_destination ("destination_id")
)
